prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room with warm warning lights and storm-night atmosphere. An androgynous crew member in a navy uniform holds a heavy control panel steady. A masculine reporter in a weatherproof jacket over formal clothes uses a repair tool on the panel. Steady, cooperative maintenance, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, cinematic anime realism. The androgynous crew member maintains a steady grip on the control panel while the masculine reporter finishes the repair adjustment. The warning lights stabilize, reflecting off the damp surfaces. No sparks, no text, no watermark, consistent character appearance.
